staff-crm.title: CRM Reporting
staff-crm.description: Staff operational reporting for pipeline workload, funnel movement, and stage velocity.

pipelineWorkload.title: Pipeline workload
pipelineWorkload.description: Live 90-day open pipeline by branch, pipeline, and currency.
pipelineWorkload.empty: No open pipeline workload is available for the default reporting window.

funnelMovement.title: Funnel movement
funnelMovement.description: Top CRM stage movement by period entries.
funnelMovement.empty: No funnel movement is available for the default reporting window.

stageVelocity.title: Stage velocity
stageVelocity.description: Slowest CRM stages by median elapsed days.
stageVelocity.empty: No stage velocity samples meet the minimum sample threshold.
stageVelocity.excludedOpenIntervals: {count, plural, one {# open interval excluded} other {# open intervals excluded}}
stageVelocity.excludedOpenIntervalsHelp: Open stage intervals are excluded from stage velocity calculations.

staff-crm.excludedRows: {count, plural, one {# aggregate row excluded} other {# aggregate rows excluded}}
staff-crm.excludedRowsHelp: Rows can be excluded from aggregate metrics when required reporting fields are missing or inconsistent.

error.tenant: CRM reporting is unavailable for this tenant context.
error.role: This staff account cannot view CRM reporting.
error.branch: CRM reporting requires a valid branch scope.
error.agent: Agent-scoped CRM reporting is not shown on the staff dashboard.
error.window: The CRM reporting window is invalid.
error.grouping: This CRM reporting grouping is not supported.
error.generic: CRM reporting could not be loaded. Try again later.
